expectations.text: getMaterial(name, options) cache pattern used — material is not created with bare new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial() each time
expectations.evidence: getMaterial() function shown with Map-based cache; shinglesMat retrieved via getMaterial('RoofShingles', {...})

expectations.text: MeshStandardMaterial with color #2F2F2F, roughness 0.9, metalness 0.0 specified correctly
model.traverse() or group.traverse() used to walk the roof mesh tree and apply the material
expectations.evidence: roofGroup.traverse() used; filters for isMesh nodes

expectations.text: Debug checklist covers at least: renderer.info memory check, castShadow/receiveShadow flags, material.name verification
expectations.evidence: Debug checklist explicitly covers renderer.info, castShadow, material.name key mismatch, geometry groups override

expectations.text: Replaced/old material disposal mentioned to prevent GPU memory leaks
expectations.evidence: applyShinglesMaterial disposes old material before assignment and explains the memory management rule
